name: Grilled Vegetable Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 medium yellow squash, sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. In a blender, mix all dressing ingredients until smooth. Set aside.
3. Arrange eggplant, yellow squash, zucchini, and onion in a single layer on a cookie sheet. Sprinkle Italian seasoning and cayenne pepper over vegetables. Spray with cooking oil to coat lightly.
4. Broil the vegetables for about 5 minutes, or until browned. Turn and broil other side. Remove from oven.
5. Halve each roasted bell pepper.
6. Cut each roll in half lengthwise and scoop out soft inner dough. Place on broiler rack and toast 2 minutes per side.
7. Add a slice (or two) of tomato to the bottom of each roll. Dust with ground pepper, jalapeno, basil leaves, arugula leaves, and roasted peppers.
8. Layer vegetables on top of the rolls. Brush remaining half of each roll with dressing and place on top of vegetables.
